THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGALINK, INC., A MERRILL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAHY, JEREMIAH $1,252.30 PRINCIPAL, $69.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,321.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
